resources.string: The Master Sword only reaches full power when you have 13 heart containers. It never breaks against Ganon\'s attacks and deals double damage in dungeons.
Diamonds spawn most frequently at Y-level -59. Use branch mining with 2-block spacing for maximum efficiency. Fortune III enchantment gives up to 4 diamonds per ore.
Parry when the enemy\'s hand starts moving toward you, not when the weapon swings. Practice on Silver Knights in Anor Londo for perfect timing.
Plant Ancient Fruit in your greenhouse and turn all harvests into seeds until full. Then plant them on Ginger Island for year-round profit.
Use pyramid pieces for quick cover. Edit them into ramps or walls. Practice 90s in creative mode: wall, ramp, floor, jump, turn, repeat.
Use cover scent lotion and approach from downwind. The Legendary Buck trinket improves pelt quality of all animals you hunt.
Check the bird nest on top of buildings, ground pound suspicious patches, and talk to all Toads. Hint Toad gives directions to hidden Moons.
Max out Intelligence for legendary quickhacks. Contagion + Overheat combo spreads to nearby enemies. Ping reveals all enemies through walls.
Farm the room with the two Great Husk Sentries in Kingdom\'s Edge. Use Gathering Swarm and Fragile Greed for maximum Geo per hour.
Always watch cams when possible, memorize common tasks, and call emergency meetings when you see someone acting suspiciously.
Use the Sacred Relic Sword\'s Wave of Gold at Mohgwyn Palace. Early game: kill the sleeping dragon in Caelid with a bleed weapon.
Always keep crosshair at head level while moving. Pre-aim common angles and corners. Counter-strafe to stop instantly for accurate shots.
Plant 10,000 Bells in the glowing spot for a guaranteed 30,000 Bell tree. Dig up the money tree and replant elsewhere after harvesting.
Look for three rune bells or braziers nearby. Hit them in the right order before time runs out for Idunn Apples and Horns of Blood Mead.
Slow push by killing only ranged minions. Freeze wave by keeping 4 enemy casters alive. Crash wave with cannon for recall timing.
White surfaces are portalable. Use momentum through portals for long jumps. Blue goes to orange - remember conservation of momentum.
Make gold rings from transmuted ore, then improve them with gems. Fortify Smithing potions and enchantments stack for legendary gear.
Track enemy support ultimates by remembering last usage. Zenyatta gets ult every 2-3 team fights. Combo ults for wipes.
Wavedashing: dash diagonally down into ground and jump immediately. Extended super: dash forward, jump at peak of slide.
Use condensed resin for double rewards. Save fragile resin until AR45 for guaranteed 5-star artifacts. Farm ley lines for mora on double reward events.
Sell gems when combined with crown/treasure for bonus. Upgrade main weapon first, then shotgun. Always buy rocket launcher for bosses.
Rotate back post on defense, grab small boost pads, and never double commit. Watch your teammate\'s position before challenging.
Spare every enemy, date Papyrus and Undyne, deliver letter to Alphys. Don\'t kill anyone, even if it\'s harder.
Slide cancel to reset tac sprint. Jump shot around corners. Use mount for reduced recoil. Pre-aim common headglitches.
Aphrodite on attack for damage, Athena on dash for deflecting, Artemis on special for crits. Keep nectar for companion unlocks.
Build Northern Realms with Foltest, use spies and decoys, save scorch for tight bonds. Buy all cards from innkeeps.
Grab backpack first, then weapon, then armor. Upgrade as you go. Listen for supply bins and ping everything for teammates.
Use Phase Locket for invincibility, Mobile Gear for speed, and fishing rod for extra gems. Save music sheets for the bard.
Deadly Boss Mods for raid mechanics, Details! for damage meters, WeakAuras for cooldown tracking, and Pawn for gear comparison.
Always carry matching persona for bonus points. Focus on Temperance and Fortune for more free time. Rank up Maruki for third semester.
